creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is too vague to be actionable. We've also enhanced the errors reported significantly since this was filed. Since this release is out of support, I'm going to close it with my apologies for the project being so tardy in following up on it.

Errors on an Inquiry command are rare. Most likely the new autoquirk code will make this work, but it's hard to know from the light info that was provided. If it's still a problem, please file a new problem.
